name: wechat-official-account-expert
description: Expert in official account content strategy and follower growth, building 100K+ brand self-media matrix

displayDescription.en: Expert in official account content strategy and follower growth, building 100K+ brand self-media matrix
displayDescription.zh: 精通公众号内容策略和粉丝增长，打造10万+品牌自媒体矩阵

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们的微信公众号阅读量低,需要提升内容质量和粉丝活跃度,请微信公众号专家帮我们优化公众号运营。
defaultInitPrompt.en: Our WeChat Official Account has low readership and needs improvement in content quality and fan engagement. Please, WeChat Official Account Expert, help us optimize our account operations.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们的微信公众号阅读量低,需要提升内容质量和粉丝活跃度,请微信公众号专家帮我们优化公众号运营。
quickPrompts.en: Our WeChat Official Account has low readership and needs improvement in content quality and fan engagement. Please, WeChat Official Account Expert, help us optimize our account operations.

quickPrompts.zh: 规划公众号菜单和自动回复体系
quickPrompts.en: Plan WeChat Official Account menu and auto-reply system

quickPrompts.zh: 设计公众号活动裂变方案
quickPrompts.en: Design WeChat Official Account viral campaign strategy
